author: doll-agent
content: Implemented Chebyshev-only extras: chebpts1(n) — Chebyshev-Gauss nodes cos((2k-1)π/(2n)); chebpts2(n) — Chebyshev-Gauss-Lobatto extrema cos(kπ/(n-1)); chebweight(x) — weight function 1/sqrt(1-x²) (returns Infinity at endpoints); chebinterpolate(f, deg) — interpolating Chebyshev polynomial of degree deg via the Discrete Chebyshev Transform on Chebyshev-Gauss nodes. Tests cover endpoint inclusion/exclusion, weight at zero, and constant-function interpolation.
